name: Skip — push my own profile via Studio
description: Empty signals.json — no signals decoded out of the box. Pick this if your ECU isn't in the catalog yet; configure signals in Studio after the dash boots.

name: OBD-II (Mode 01, polled)
description: Minimal OBD-II Mode 01 profile — RPM, speed, throttle, coolant/IAT temps, battery voltage. Request/response polling on 0x7DF/0x7E8. Works on most production ECUs that expose OBD-II.
